name: PhotoPrism
description: Self-host your photo and video library
compose:
name: slashnode-photoprism
services:
  web:
    image: photoprism/photoprism:260305
    container_name: photoprism-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PHOTOPRISM_ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      PHOTOPRISM_ORIGINALS_LIMIT: '10000'
      PHOTOPRISM_HTTP_COMPRESSION: gzip
      PHOTOPRISM_HTTP_PORT: '8087'
      PHOTOPRISM_DATABASE_DRIVER: mysql
      PHOTOPRISM_DATABASE_SERVER: photoprism-db:3306
      PHOTOPRISM_DATABASE_NAME: photoprism
      PHOTOPRISM_DATABASE_USER: photoprism
      PHOTOPRISM_DATABASE_PASSWORD: photoprism
      PHOTOPRISM_SITE_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8087/
      PHOTOPRISM_SITE_TITLE: PhotoPrism
      PHOTOPRISM_SITE_CAPTION: Digital Asset Management
      PHOTOPRISM_SITE_DESCRIPTION: ''
      PHOTOPRISM_SITE_AUTHOR: ''
    volumes:
      - web_originals:/photoprism/originals
      - web_storage:/photoprism/storage
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8087:8087
  db:
    image: mariadb:10.5.12
    container_name: photoprism-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: mysqld --transaction-isolation=READ-COMMITTED --character-set-server=utf8mb4 --collation-server=utf8mb4_unicode_ci --max-connections=512 --innodb-rollback-on-timeout=OFF --innodb-lock-wait-timeout=50
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: photoprism
      MYSQL_DATABASE: photoprism
      MYSQL_USER: photoprism
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: photoprism
    volumes:
      - db_database:/var/lib/mysql
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_originals:
    name: slashnode-photoprism_web_originals
  web_storage:
    name: slashnode-photoprism_web_storage
  db_database:
    name: slashnode-photoprism_db_database
notes: Ported from Umbrel (photoprism). Upstream: https://photoprism.app. Admin password is the value you set (PHOTOPRISM_ADMIN_PASSWORD). The internal MariaDB password is app-internal. Default login — user: "admin", password: "".
